notes: This file is committed for auditability. It assists the Master Agent with state between sessions. Updates to project_context.md (SOT-like) or significant memory changes are high-risk and require the Mandatory Review Gate + coordinated Primary SOT updates. Railway ephemeral FS limitations apply (see RAILWAY.md and worker persistence). Phase 1 foundation only - no autonomous loops. Phase 2 first inc (Review Agent 2026-06 Approved with Conditions): added plan_outcomes (minimal append-only log for proposals + plan runs). Full proposal text lives in orchestrator printed output + reviews/ files. Any schema evolution is high-risk.
review_agent_2026_06: Created as part of Phase 1 per Review Agent Approved with Conditions (High Risk). Master retains authority. Phase 2 first inc extension: plan_outcomes array added (high-risk, documented).
